2277370.name: Marco Entertainment
2277370.description:
Welcome to Marco Entertainment, created by the legendary Marco Garcia. Marco Entertainment gives you the tools to create your very own superstar! In this free demo version, you can participate in a playtest focusing on the innovative features of the game such as character customization and dance choreography.

Presenting the wondrous world of Marco Elysium!

In this amazing world, players will discover a plethora of different places all set up with their highly personalized characters in mind.
Players will enjoy a world brimming with color and will be able to explore the thriving city within it by visiting various locations like the Elvis Hair Shop, the Gorilla Gym, the Design House, the Dance Studio, and many others. Go and experience the fun for yourself!

Powerful and Easy-to-use Character Customization Tools

At Marco Entertainment, you are given an abundance of powerful and intuitive Character Customization Tools which you will need to make your very own character with a style and personality of your choosing.
Of course, players will be able customize many different aspects about their character such as its appearance, body shape, hair style, accessories, and so forth, but they will also be able to directly personalize their character's outfits, and even their tattoos as well. Try and see what you can come up with.

Produce Great Performances at the Dance Studio

At the dance studio, there are a variety of creative tools as well as over 1,000 street dance cards that can be used, making it easy for anyone to choreograph an amazing performance. Feel free to record your performances and dance with your friends from all around the world. The demo contains roughly 500 dance cards for you to try out. 

Dance Cards Made Using Motion Capture and Professional Street Dancers

The more than 1,000 different dance cards available in the game consist of eight beats and were all created by capturing the movements of real professional street dancers using full-body motion capture equipment. This will enhance your dances with a level of realism and excitement that can’t be beaten! The dance cards come in 10 different styles including hip-hop, popping, waving, locking, waacking, house dance, and others. Play around with any of these dance cards and have fun coming up with amazing performances all your own.

Enjoy performing exciting street dances with your friends!

Host your very own street dances in the world of Marco Elysium and have fun getting your groove on either 'alone' or 'together' with your friends!
As you go about the world, you can join in on the street performances of other characters or just watch if you would like. We're sure that you would fit right in!
These performances can be recorded and shared with friends to create cheerful memories.
2277370.supported_languages: 英语, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
